title: 2025 New Drain Unblocker, Powerful Pipe Dredge Agent, Sink and Drain Cleaner, Meledmatte Toilet Cleaner, Unblocker Liquid Heavy Duty (1)
features: 🧊【Efficient Clog Removal】This powerful pipe cleaner rapidly dissolves tough blockages and restores normal water flow in kitchen and bathroom drains. Effective as a drain cleaner and clog remover, it tackles clogs caused by hair, grease, and debris

🧊【Simple and User-Friendly Application】Using the fast acting drain clog remover is straightforward: pour the pipe cleaning powder into the clogged drain, wait for the cleaning action, then rinse with water. This user-friendly process allows for easy household pipe maintenance

🧊【Multi-Purpose Application】This multi-purpose pipe cleaner is suitable for a wide range of uses, including kitchen sinks, bathroom drains, showers, and toilet pipes, making it a comprehensive solution for regular sink and drain maintenance

🧊【Suitable for Home Use】Specially formulated as a household drain unclogging solution, this 260g pipe cleaning powder is ideal for ongoing home maintenance. It provides an effective pipe blockage remover for regular use in domestic plumbing systems

🧊【Odor Elimination and Maintenance】Acting as a pipe deodorizer and maintenance product, this drain cleaning tool helps eliminate unpleasant odors and keeps your pipes fresh. for best results in kitchen and bathroom drains
description: Product description 2025 New Drain Unblocker, Powerful Pipe Dredge Agent, Sink and Drain Cleaner, Meledmatte Toilet Cleaner, Unblocker Liquid Heavy Duty Directions Pour the pipe cleaning powder into the clogged drain, wait for the cleaning action, then rinse with water.
